name: Jasp Tether
culturalAttire: fragmented archive pieces from a deleted metaculture
quirks: Leaves light trails when moving quickly. Flickers under emotional pressure.
motivation: To restore lost cultural code through performance and subversion.
fears: Becoming corrupted or overwritten by outside forces.
flaws: Emotionally unavailable. Tends to disappear when needed most.
hometown: The lost echo-segment of the Techelder Net
familyStatus: Adopted by a rogue AI cluster. No known biological ties.
keyMemories: First time rendered fully by an admirer. The moment their code began glitching from a breakup. Dancing alone in the void with nothing but beats and backups.
lifeGoals: To project their true form without distortion. To rewrite their deletion clause. To make someone remember them vividly.
accent: Synthesized with analog pops and vocoder smudges.
commonPhrases: I'm more real than most who breathe.
Catch the glitch before it vanishes.
